W+ How to Use My Offers And Collect Buy Button Links

A 6 steps guide covering the buy link collection workflow on warriorplus.com.

6 steps • Generated 3/27/2026

Table of Contents

1
Step number one, go to Vendor and click Offers.
2
Step number two, select the offer you want to work on.
3
Step number three, enter the offer setup page.
4
Step number four, get codes.
5
Step number five, carefully collect the product by links.
6
Step six, collect and save the buy links, the pixels of all the products you need.
1
Step number one, go to Vendor and click Offers.

Click Vendor on the menu and choose Offers from the drop-down list.

https://warriorplus.com/vendor/offers
2
Step number two, select the offer you want to work on.

Click on the offer you want to work on.

https://warriorplus.com/vendor/offers
3
Step number three, enter the offer setup page.

This is inside the offer.

https://warriorplus.com/vendor/offers/90811
4
Step number four, get codes.

Click on the get code button.

https://warriorplus.com/vendor/offers/90811
5
Step number five, carefully collect the product by links.

Choose the product you want to take buy button of. Then click pixel only. Here is the buy button link. The pixel only code should be placed on the page for tracking purpose.

https://warriorplus.com/vendor/offers/90811
6
Step six, collect and save the buy links, the pixels of all the products you need.

You have to click this drop-down list separately for every product in order to collect buy buttons and follow the same process.

https://warriorplus.com/vendor/offers/90811
